narrative:
Cols 67-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 730 registered voters, with 69.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
